PATIENT_ID: TEST_VAP_003
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-15 10:00:00
Patient breathing spontaneously on nasal cannula.
Oxygen supplementation via nasal cannula at 2 L/min.

[IMAGING] 2026-01-20 08:00:00
CT chest shows left upper lobe consolidation with air bronchogram
consistent with pneumonia. Moderate left pleural effusion.

[LAB] 2026-01-20 11:00:00
Sputum culture positive for Streptococcus pneumoniae.
